title: Oath of office
doc_html:
§836.  Oath of office

Each member appointed to the board shall qualify by taking the oath of office before any officer authorized by law to administer oaths in this state within ten days after the appointment.  This shall be noted on the certificate of appointment.
doc_text:
§836.  Oath of office
Each member appointed to the board shall qualify by taking the oath of office before any officer authorized by law to administer oaths in this state within ten days after the appointment.  This shall be noted on the certificate of appointment.
